headlines.description: — Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills placed an emphatic stamp on their breakout season with a 56-26 rout of Miami on Sunday in a game the Dolphins could have clinched a playoff berth with a win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dolphins miss chance to clinch after 56-26 loss to Bills

headlines.description: — The Baltimore Ravens used a club-record 404 yards rushing Sunday to clinch a playoff spot, beating Cincinnati 38-3 as Lamar Jackson threw three touchdown passes and became the first NFL quarterback to rush for more than 1,000 yards in two...
headlines.shortLinkText: Ravens clinch playoff spot with 38-3 rout of Bengals

headlines.description: — The Cleveland Browns are back in the playoffs, qualifying for the first time since 2002 on Sunday by surviving a late Pittsburgh rally for a 24-22 win over the Steelers, who rested quarterback Ben Roethlisberger and several other starters.
headlines.shortLinkText: Browns end playoff drought, survive late Steelers rally

headlines.description: — Kirk Cousins threw for 405 yards and three touchdowns, lifting the Minnesota Vikings to a 37-35 win over the Detroit Lions on Sunday in a matchup of teams finishing disappointing seasons.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cousins throws 3 TDs, Vikings end with 37-35 win over Lions

events.name: New York Jets at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — Cam Newton had three touchdown passes and caught another, and the New England Patriots rallied to beat the New York Jets 28-14 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Newton accounts for 4 TDs, Patriots roll 28-14 over Jets

events.name: Dallas Cowboys at New York Giants

headlines.description: — The New York Giants won. Now they wait.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giants outlast Cowboys 23-19, stay in running for NFC East

events.name: Atlanta Falcons at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Tom Brady threw for 399 yards and four touchdowns Sunday, helping the playoff-bound Tampa Bay Buccaneers clinch the fifth seed in the NFC with a 44-27 regular season-ending win over the Atlanta Falcons.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady throws for 4 TDs, Bucs pull away from Falcons 44-27

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Chicago Bears

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers threw for four touchdowns, breaking his franchise record for scoring passes in a season, and the Green Bay Packers clinched the No. 1 seed in the NFC by beating the playoff-bound Chicago Bears 35-16 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rodgers throws 4 TDs, Packers beat Bears 35-16 for top seed

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Denver Broncos

headlines.description: — Darren Waller caught Derek Carr's 2-point conversion pass with 24 seconds left Sunday, and the Las Vegas Raiders rallied to beat the Denver Broncos 32-31 despite committing four turnovers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Derek Carr rallies Las Vegas Raiders to 32-31 win in Denver

headlines.description: — Jonathan Taylor rushed for a franchise-record 253 yards and two scores, capping the Indianapolis Colts' 28-14 playoff-clinching victory over Jacksonville on Sunday with a 45-yard touchdown run with 3:35 to go.
headlines.shortLinkText: Taylor-made day sends Colts past Jags, back into playoffs

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — Justin Herbert threw for 302 yards and accounted for four touchdowns against a team of mostly Kansas City backups, and the Chargers rolled to a 38-21 victory Sunday as the Chiefs turned their attention to the postseason and Los Angeles to the...
headlines.shortLinkText: Chargers beat playoff-bound Chiefs 38-21 as KC rests stars

events.name: Arizona Cardinals at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — John Wolford passed for 231 yards and rushed for 56 more in his NFL debut, and the Los Angeles Rams are headed to the playoffs with an 18-7 victory over the Arizona Cardinals on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wolford, defense lead Rams past Arizona 18-7, into playoffs

headlines.description: — Russell Wilson connected on two fourth-quarter touchdown passes to Tyler Lockett and the Seattle Seahawks rallied for a 26-23 win over the San Francisco 49ers on Sunday to end the season on a four-game winning streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wilson, Lockett help Seahawks rally for 26-23 win over 49ers

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — Drew Brees threw for 201 yards and three touchdowns, the Saints had five interceptions and New Orleans defeated the Carolina Panthers 33-7 on Sunday to wrap up the No. 2 seed in the NFC playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saints rout Panthers 33-7 to earn No. 2 seed in NFC playoffs

headlines.description: — The Tennessee Titans won the AFC South on Sunday. All it took was Derrick Henry surpassing 2,000 yards rushing and rookie Sam Sloman’s 37-yard field goal that bounced off the upright and through for a 41-38 victory over the Houston Texans.
headlines.shortLinkText: Henry passes 2K, Titans beat Texans 41-38 on late field goal

headlines.description: — Just call the Washington Football Team division champs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Washington beats the Eagles 20-14, captures NFC East title
